expected_lead_schema.source: Google Sheets (lead form responses) and WATI inbound

field_definitions.submitted_at: ISO 8601 timestamp (Asia/Manila preferred, must include timezone)
field_definitions.name: Full name, free text
field_definitions.email: Valid email; deduplication key together with phone
field_definitions.phone: E.164 with country code (e.g., +972...), required for WhatsApp follow-up
field_definitions.country: ISO country code or full name; expected values include IL and PH
field_definitions.investment_amount: Numeric. IL: ILS. PH: PHP. Currency inferred from country/language
field_definitions.utm_source: facebook | google | instagram | direct | organic | whatsapp
field_definitions.utm_campaign: IL-1, IL-2, PH-1, etc. matching active campaign codes

expected_lead_schema.hot_lead_action: Send WATI alert to sales agent and mark priority='HOT' in lead_updates.json. Never contact the lead directly.

state_files.rationale_for_no_write: Preparation mode. No live polling performed, so the watermark must not advance. The state file structure is correct and ready for the first LIVE run.

queue_status.note: No launch-day task bundle yet. alert_no_tasks.md has been carried forward by CONTENT_POST at 10:00 PHT. Claude Code (planning) should generate _queue/{date}/tasks_lead.json before flipping simulation=false.

suggested_actions: Install the Cowork connectors required for live lead intake: Google Drive (or Google Sheets), WATI, HubSpot, Brevo, Meta Ads. Without them this agent cannot poll any source even after accounts exist.
Resolve the IL pricing mismatch first. Recommend CLAUDE.md as source of truth (1,535,000 ILS / 1,650,000 ILS / 9,999 ILS) and align campaign_state.json before any IL ad or lead form goes live.

Create the Google Sheet 'Panglao Prime Villas - Lead Form Responses' with the columns listed in expected_lead_schema. Share with the Cowork Google Drive connector. Record sheetId and tab name in campaign_state.json under a new platforms.lead_sources.google_sheets node and in _status/lead_check_state.json.lead_source_sheet.
Stand up the website lead form on primevilla.ph that writes to that sheet, with UTM passthrough and language field.
Create the WATI account, capture Client ID, define inbound intake template, and add sales_agent {name, whatsapp, email, hours_pht, escalation_sla_minutes} to campaign_state.json.
Create the HubSpot portal (or alternative CRM) with one pipeline: New -> Qualified -> Meeting Scheduled -> Reservation Paid -> Contract -> Closed.
Create the Brevo account and a 'Leads' contact list with custom attributes matching expected_lead_schema.
Create at least one Meta Lead Ads form and one Google Ads Lead Form asset.
Install Meta Pixel and Google Tag on primevilla.ph (snippet at _status/tracking_codes_install.html).
Reconcile scheduled-tasks cron with documented PHT slots, or update agent prompts to match the actual fire times. Drift now reproducible across three consecutive LEAD_CHECK runs.
Investigate why 2026-05-29 produced no artifacts and no heartbeat - either a missed cron day or a silent failure in all five agents.
Once all of the above are green: set start_date + go_live_date, flip simulation=false, and let LEAD_CHECK begin real polling.
live_lead_collection_skip_reason: Phase is PRE_LAUNCH and simulation=true. No live lead intake configured. Connectors empty, lead sheet not provisioned, WATI inbox not provisioned.
hebrew_summary: מצב קליטת לידים ב 30-05-2026, 13:00 שעון מנילה: עדיין מצב הכנה, אין שינוי מהריצה הקודמת ב 28-05. ערוצים פעילים לקליטת לידים היום: אפס. רישום ה connectors ב Cowork ריק לחלוטין בריצה הזו, כלומר גם Google Sheets, גם WATI, גם HubSpot, גם Brevo, וגם Meta Ads לא נגישים מהסשן הנוכחי. גם אם החשבונות היו קיימים, לא ניתן היה לסקור אותם. גיליון הלידים ב Google Sheets טרם נוצר ולא משויך, ל WATI אין חשבון ו Client ID, HubSpot ו Brevo עדיין לא מוקמו, ואין טפסי Lead Ads ב Meta או ב Google. ה Pixel וה Google Tag לא הותקנו ב primevilla.ph. אין סוכן מכירות מוגדר ב campaign_state.json. חוסר ההתאמה במחירי השקל בין CLAUDE.md (1,535,000 ש"ח / 1,650,000 ש"ח) לבין campaign_state.json (1,450,000 ש"ח / 1,550,000 ש"ח) לא נסגר, מעל 72 שעות פתוח. בנוסף, היום ה 29-05 לא הותיר שום פעילות בתיקיית _completed ושום עדכון heartbeat, כך שכנראה כל סבב האתמול נפל בשקט. עד שכל החסמים סגורים אין על מה לסקור לידים בפועל. ההמלצה: לפני שהופכים simulation ל false, להתקין connectors, להקים גיליון לידים, להזין סוכן מכירות, ולהשוות את מחירי השקל למקור אמת אחד.
